---
title: "HRS 2016 Cognitive Classification: Updated Algorithm"
title-slide-attributes:
  data-background-image: ../Figures/Gemini-Brown-Amphibian.png
  data-background-size: contain
  data-background-opacity: "1"
author: "Rich Jones and Doug Tommet for HRS/HCAP Working Group"
date: '`r Sys.Date()`'
format:
  revealjs:
    theme: white
    slide-number: true
    self-contained: true
    code-copy: true
    code-line-numbers: true
    fig-align: center
    controls: true
    controls-layout: bottom-right
editor: source
include-in-header:
  - text: |
      <style>
      .reveal .slide-number {
        top: 1em !important;
        right: 1em !important;
        bottom: auto !important;
        left: auto !important;
      }
      .reveal pre {
        max-height: 850px !important;
        width: 100% !important;
        overflow-y: auto !important;
      }
      .reveal pre code {
        max-height: 850px !important;
        overflow-y: auto !important;
      }
      </style>
---

```{r setup}
#| include: false
#| message: false
#| warning: false

invisible(
  suppressMessages(
    suppressPackageStartupMessages({
      source(here::here("R", "A7_001-libraries.R"))
    })
  )
)
```

```{r load-data}
#| include: false

hcap_tables_path <- here::here("R_objects", "A7_100_hcap_tables.rds")
if (!file.exists(hcap_tables_path)) {
  stop(
    "Required object not found: R_objects/A7_100_hcap_tables.rds\n",
    "Run Analysis A7 (quarto render R/A7_000-Main_control.qmd) before rendering these slides."
  )
}
hcap_tables <- readRDS(hcap_tables_path)
```

{{< include A8_010_Introduction.qmd >}}
{{< include A8_020_Methods.qmd >}}
{{< include A8_030_Results.qmd >}}
{{< include A8_040_Conclusion.qmd >}}
